title: nephrodium arcuatum
intro: Nephrodium arcuatum, also known as the curved fern or arcuate fern, is a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Nephrodium arcuatum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
